channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Largest Genetic Analysis of Alzheimer's Disease Reveals 48 Previously Unreported Risk Regions
item.description: A comprehensive genetic study, the largest of its kind analyzing common variants in Alzheimer's disease, examined data from over 2.8 million individuals across multiple ancestry groups. Researchers id...

item.title: Texas Secretary of State Jane Nelson Announces Resignation Amid Debate Over Closed Primaries
item.description: Texas Secretary of State Jane Nelson announced that she will resign from her position effective July 17, ending a tenure of nearly four years overseeing the state's election administration. In her res...

item.title: MK Party suspends Mmabatho Mokoena-Zondi and removes her as chief whip following fraud allegations
item.description: The MK Party has removed its parliamentary chief whip, Mmabatho Mokoena-Zondi, and suspended her party membership with immediate effect after she was charged with fraud involving more than R230,000. A...

item.title: Police Respond to Hostage Situation at Downtown Bakersfield Chase Bank After Suspect Claims to Have Explosive Device
item.description: Authorities in Bakersfield, California, responded to a major hostage situation on June 2, 2026, after a man entered a Chase Bank in the city’s downtown area and reportedly claimed to have a bomb strap...

item.title: Rare Early 20th-Century Postcards Showcase the Life and Career of Austrian Silent Film Star Mia May
item.description: The article presents a collection of 26 vintage postcards featuring Austrian actress Mia May, one of the prominent stars of early German silent cinema. Born Hermine Pfleger in Vienna in 1884, she demo...

item.title: Former political aide files lawsuit over alleged dating app catfishing and covert recordings
item.description: A former senior political aide to New Jersey Governor Phil Murphy has filed a lawsuit alleging he was the victim of an elaborate deception involving a dating app relationship that turned into a covert...

item.title: James Carville Questions Trump's Health and Policy Priorities Amid Comments on Walter Reed Visits
item.description: Democratic strategist James Carville criticized President Donald Trump during an appearance on MSNBC’s 'The Beat,' raising concerns about both Trump’s health and his policy priorities. Carville respon...

item.title: Post Malone Cancels Six Joint Tour Dates with Jelly Roll Amid Scheduling Conflicts and Political Speculation
item.description: Post Malone has canceled six upcoming tour dates on the Big A-- Stadium Tour Part 2, where he was scheduled to perform alongside country-rap artist Jelly Roll. The affected shows include stops in El P...

item.title: Philadelphia Eagles Trade A.J. Brown to New England Patriots for 2028 First-Round Pick and 2027 Fifth-Round Pick
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles have agreed to trade star wide receiver A.J. Brown to the New England Patriots in exchange for a first-round draft pick in 2028 and a 2027 fifth-round pick, the better of New E...

item.title: Usha Vance Urges Respect for Supreme Court Justices Amid Rising Political Criticism
item.description: Second Lady Usha Vance publicly emphasized the importance of respecting Supreme Court justices during a recent interview, offering a message that appeared to contrast with ongoing critical remarks dir...

item.title: Trump Administration Appoints Jan. 6 Participant to Pentagon Counterterrorism Position
item.description: The Trump administration has appointed Elias Irizarry, who participated in the January 6, 2021, Capitol riot, to a role in the Defense Department's Special Operations and Low Intensity Conflict office...

item.title: Google introduces Android caller verification feature to reduce spoofed calls and phone scams
item.description: Google is rolling out a new anti-scam feature for Android phones designed to verify the authenticity of incoming calls and reduce caller ID spoofing. Built into the Google Dialer and available on devi...

item.title: White House Defends Trump’s Record-High Posting Activity on Truth Social
item.description: A report highlights that U.S. President Donald Trump set a notable social media milestone in May by posting 861 times on his platform Truth Social, according to reporting cited by the Daily Beast. The...

item.title: OpenAI's Codex Emphasizes Governance, Approval Controls, and Auditability for Enterprise Agent Deployment
item.description: The article argues that OpenAI's approach to deploying coding agents, particularly Codex, prioritizes governance and risk management over benchmark performance. According to the analysis, the architec...

item.title: Australian farmers prepare for possible El Niño conditions amid growing climate change impacts
item.description: Australian farmers are closely monitoring forecasts as meteorological agencies consider declaring an El Niño event in the coming weeks. El Niño conditions are typically linked to below-average rainfal...

item.title: Todd Blanche questioned in Congress over DOJ settlement shielding Trump family from IRS scrutiny
item.description: During a heated House Appropriations Committee hearing in Washington, D.C., Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche faced sharp questioning from Rep. Rosa DeLauro (D-CT) over a Justice Department-related...

item.title: Former Trump aide warns that fame and name recognition are distorting U.S. political selection
item.description: Anthony Scaramucci, who previously served as White House communications director under Donald Trump, has raised concerns about the growing role of celebrity status and name recognition in American pol...

item.title: Kenya Strengthens Ebola Prevention with Enhanced Screening and Possible Quarantine at Borders
item.description: The Ministry of Health in Kenya has announced new measures to prevent the spread of Ebola into the country. All incoming travellers may soon need to show certified exit surveillance reports from their...

item.title: Report Claims Trump Has Limited Public Appearances Amid Strained Iran Negotiations and Policy Criticism
item.description: According to a report cited in the article, U.S. President Donald Trump has remained largely out of public view for at least two days following the suspension of negotiations involving Iran and escala...

item.title: Tanzania–Brazil Cotton with Decent Work Project Shows Major Progress in Reducing Child Labour in Cotton Sector
item.description: The Cotton with Decent Work project, jointly implemented by the Governments of Tanzania and Brazil in collaboration with the International Labour Organization (ILO), has reported strong progress in ad...
